title: Nephrodium canescens
intro: Nephrodium canescens, also known as Lady fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, Lady fern has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce swelling, soothe pain, and protect against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Lady fern include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and polysaccharides, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. In herbal medicine, Lady fern is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to make infusions and topical creams for the treatment of various health conditions.
